name: Feishu PPS Privacy
description: Per-session privacy policy for Feishu: strict vs owner-DM, tool interception, audit, owner notify

ownerOpenId.description: Feishu user open_id (ou_xxx) for owner DM; used to classify OWNER_DM vs NON_OWNER_DM

auditPath.description: Optional override for JSONL audit file path

notifyOwnerOnBlock.description: Send summary to owner DM when GROUP or NON_OWNER_DM triggers block/redact
